title: justicia lanceolata
intro: Justicia lanceolata, also known as the lanceleaf water willow, is a plant species within the Acanthaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to Central America and the southeastern United States. The lanceleaf water willow has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Justicia lanceolata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to promote the health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and supporting immune function.
